title: Invoice shows duplicate charge for April seats
body: Hi team - our April invoice (INV-2026-04-88421) shows two line items of $4,200 for the exact same seat pack. Pretty sure we only added 14 seats, not 28. Can someone look into this before our AP cutoff on the 25th? Happy to send screenshots.

title: API returning 429 on /v2/exports despite low call volume
body: We're hitting 429 Too Many Requests on POST /api/v2/exports even though we're well under the documented 60 rpm limit. Retry-After header says 47 seconds. This started around 2026-04-19 08:00 UTC. Running from our us-east prod cluster. Example request id: req_8f3d2a1c9e.

title: Need to remove departing employee immediately
body: Employee separation today, effective 5pm ET. Please remove user jsmith@meridiancap.com from all access and transfer owned reports to tscott@meridiancap.com. This is a terminated-for-cause situation so please treat as urgent. Confirm once done.

title: How do I schedule a recurring CSV export?
body: Hi - new admin here. I've figured out how to run a one-off export but I need it to run every Monday at 6am and drop into our SFTP. Is there a docs page on this? Couldn't find one that matched the current UI. Thanks!

title: Dashboard takes 45+ seconds to load
body: The operations dashboard has become unusable since last Tuesday. Load times are 45-90 seconds and sometimes it times out entirely. Three of us are seeing the same thing, all on Chrome 124. I've tried incognito and it's a bit better but still 20+ seconds. Nothing changed on our end that we know of.

title: VP escalation: SSO outage blocking go-live
body: This is Janelle Okafor, VP Infrastructure at Pinnacle. Our SSO integration stopped issuing SAML assertions at 6:04am ET this morning and we have 1,200 clinical users locked out. We have a board-visible go-live at noon. I need someone on a bridge call in the next 30 minutes. Calling my CSM now as well.

title: password reset link expired before I could click it
body: i keep trying to reset my password but by the time i open the email the link says expired. this is the fourth time. can you just reset it manually or extend the link ttl? my email is admin@bluepeak.app. thanks

title: Webhook not firing for ticket.updated events
body: Our webhook endpoint (https://ironcladsec.com/webhooks/support) is receiving ticket.created but not ticket.updated. Config has both events subscribed. Checked signature verification on our side - we're not rejecting anything, we're just not receiving the payloads. Dashboard shows 0 delivery attempts for ticket.updated in the last 7 days.

title: Charge on 4/15 shouldn't have happened. Refund.
body: We downgraded to starter on April 3rd. You still charged us the business-tier $499 on April 15th. Refund and fix the billing.

title: Enable SSO for our Okta tenant
body: Hi - we're ready to enable SAML SSO for Evergreen Energy (tenant id acme-corp-evergreen). IdP is Okta. Our IT lead, Kai Wilson, can provide the metadata XML whenever your team is ready. We've read the KB article but would prefer a 15-minute call to walk through it on our side. Available times attached.

title: Is there a dark mode?
body: Quick question - is there a dark mode for the dashboard? Working late and the white background is killing my eyes. If not, is it on the roadmap?

title: Annual invoice line items don't match contract
body: Our signed order form from December lists 45 enterprise seats at $2,100/seat/year with a 12% discount. The invoice received yesterday shows 45 seats at $2,100 but with only a 9% discount applied. That's a $2,835 discrepancy. Attaching the executed order form. Please correct and reissue before our AP deadline.

title: 2FA codes not being received on company phones
body: Since the maintenance window on 4/19, none of our users are receiving 2FA SMS codes on company-issued phones (Verizon carrier). Personal phones work fine. We've reset the 2FA setup for two test users - same result. Email codes arrive instantly. Is there something on the SMS provider side?

title: Training session for new ops team
body: Hi - we've hired 6 new ops analysts and I'd like to get them onboarded with a formal training session rather than the self-serve materials. Is this included in our business plan or does it need to be purchased separately? Ideally we'd do it in May.

title: Getting 401 Unauthorized on previously working API key
body: Our prod API key (last 4: ...7a2f) started returning 401 Unauthorized this morning at approximately 04:20 UTC. The key was working fine yesterday. I've confirmed no one on our team rotated it. Can you check if something happened on your side (revocation, tenant migration, etc)?

title: Mobile app crashes when opening ticket attachments
body: iOS mobile app (v4.12.1, iPhone 15 Pro, iOS 17.4) crashes every time I tap an attachment on a ticket. Works fine on my iPad and on the web. This has been happening for about a week. Happy to share a crash log if you tell me where to find it.

title: Tax ID update needed on billing profile
body: We registered a new legal entity on April 1 and need to update our tax ID / VAT number on the billing profile from 87-1234567 to 92-7654321. Please advise on what documentation you need. Also - will this trigger re-issuance of our March invoice?

title: Where are the pgvector extension docs?
body: Hi support - we saw in your April release notes that pgvector is now available for enterprise customers to query embeddings directly. Couldn't find the docs on the endpoint shape. Is there a preview guide available? We'd like to pilot it on our clinical notes corpus.

title: This is the third time I've contacted support about this
body: I am beyond frustrated. This is the THIRD time I've opened a ticket about the same issue - my team role assignments revert after 24 hours. Previous tickets were TKT-09988 and TKT-09903, both marked resolved, neither actually resolved. I want this escalated today. Not tomorrow.

title: Question about prorated charges on mid-month upgrade
body: Hi team - could you please help me understand how prorated charges work? We upgraded from business to enterprise on 2026-03-18 and the invoice line items are confusing. There's a credit for $1,240 and a charge for $4,680. Is that net-new amount correct for a half-month upgrade on 24 seats? Would appreciate a breakdown.

title: 500 error on GET /api/v2/tickets when include_conversation=true
body: Consistently getting 500 Internal Server Error when calling GET /api/v2/tickets with include_conversation=true and limit=100. Drops to 200 OK when include_conversation=false or when limit<=50. Request id on last attempt: req_c8e2d194ab. Started around 2026-04-19.

title: Add new admin user to our tenant
body: Please add Kai Wilson (kwilson@evergreenenergy.com) as a tenant admin. She's replacing me as primary admin effective May 1. I'll remain on the account as a billing contact only. Confirm when the invite email has been sent.

title: Can we get a feature that auto-tags tickets by keyword?
body: Feature request: it would be really useful if we could configure keyword-based auto-tagging rules. For example, any ticket containing 'refund' gets auto-tagged 'refund-request'. We're doing this manually right now across ~300 tickets/week and it's eating analyst time.

title: Cannot download CSV export larger than 500MB
body: We're trying to export our Q1 ticket history (about 820MB uncompressed CSV). Export job completes successfully per the UI but the download link returns a 502 Bad Gateway after about 90 seconds. Tried on two different networks. Works fine for smaller date ranges. Is there a streaming option?

title: Payment method on file was declined - please advise
body: Got an email saying our April auto-payment failed. The card on file expired last month and we forgot to update it. What's the process to get a new card added before our account goes into delinquent status? We absolutely want to keep the service.

title: Domain verification stuck in pending
body: I added skyline-logistics.io as a verified domain 3 days ago. Added the TXT record to our DNS (confirmed with dig TXT _acme-verify.skyline-logistics.io - value matches what you gave us). Status in dashboard still shows pending. DNS propagation should be done. What am I missing?

title: Webhook signature verification failing after latest update
body: After the 2026-04-15 update, webhook signatures from your service are failing HMAC verification on our side. We're using the X-Webhook-Signature header and our secret hasn't changed. Verified the raw body is what's documented. Suspect you may have changed the signing algorithm or canonicalization?

title: Downgrade confirmation - will we lose historical data?
body: Planning to downgrade from enterprise to business at renewal. Our big concern: we have 18 months of ticket history and custom reports. Does any of that get purged or become inaccessible when we move to business? Need to answer this in a steering committee tomorrow afternoon.

title: IE11 support?
body: Some of our plant-floor terminals still run IE11. Does the dashboard work on IE11 or do we need to upgrade those machines? Upgrade would be a non-trivial capex conversation internally.

title: Urgent: PHI potentially visible to wrong tenant
body: We just noticed that a saved report titled 'ER Intake Notes - Week of 4/14' is showing data that appears to belong to another customer. We're a healthcare org. This is potentially a HIPAA incident. Need to escalate IMMEDIATELY. I'm calling my CSM and our compliance officer.

title: Need invoice PDF for January
body: can you send me the pdf of our january invoice? i can see it in the billing tab but the download button does nothing. thanks

title: Seat overage question
body: We got an email saying we're in overage for April (52 active users vs our 45-seat plan). How is 'active' defined? We have several contractors who log in maybe once a month. Are they counted as active seats?

title: Globex procurement: quarterly PO alignment
body: Greetings from Globex Procurement. Our quarterly PO cycle runs on a different fiscal calendar than yours. We need to shift our invoice date from the 15th of the month to the 28th to align with our PO processing window. What's the process for adjusting billing date on our contract? This affects our Q3 spend commitment.

title: Claims data export timed out after 15 minutes
body: Trying to export Q1 claims data for our audit. Export job at /api/v2/exports with date_range=2026-01-01:2026-03-31 times out at 15:00 exactly every time. Looks like a hard limit. We need this data for an actuarial review with a deadline of 4/30. Is there a streaming or chunked export option?

title: Dispatch dashboard missing saved filters after login
body: Morning - our dispatchers are reporting that their saved filters on the Dispatch dashboard are gone after signing in today. Preferences, saved views, column widths - all reset to defaults. Happening for about 12 users so far. Anyone else reporting this? Affects our morning run planning.

title: Starter plan - can we enable webhooks?
body: Hi - we're on starter plan, love the product so far. Question: is there any way to enable webhooks on starter? We just need one endpoint for ticket.created and would pay a small incremental fee. Full business plan is overkill for our team size.

title: Unable to add new seat - hitting plan cap
body: I tried to provision a new user (dhernandez@halstontextile.com) and got 'Seat limit reached'. Our contract says we have 30 seats but the dashboard only shows 25 available. Did our seat count get reduced? Need to add this person today, they start Monday.

title: password reset not working - stuck in loop
body: I reset my password three times now. Every time I try to log in with the new password, it says 'incorrect password' and sends me back to reset. Browser is Firefox 121, Mac. Cleared cache. No luck. Help?

title: Unexpected $1,850 charge - what is this for?
body: Saw a charge for $1,850 on our 4/18 statement labeled 'Overage - Data Retention'. We don't remember agreeing to any data retention add-on. Can you show us where this came from? If it's legitimate, fine, but we'd like an explanation before we pay.

title: Integration with ServiceNow - does it still work?
body: Quick check - is the ServiceNow sidecar integration still supported? Haven't used it in 6 months and when I tried to reconnect today I got an error about deprecated OAuth scopes. Is there a newer version we should move to?

title: 2FA enrollment failing for new users
body: We onboarded 4 new dispatchers yesterday. All 4 are unable to complete 2FA enrollment - the QR code scans but when they enter the verification code the page hangs then errors out with 'Something went wrong'. Tried Google Authenticator and Authy, same result. Existing users with 2FA are unaffected.

title: Need historical usage report for renewal negotiations
body: Hi - we're coming up on renewal (June 1) and Finance wants a 12-month usage report showing seat utilization, API calls, and storage. Can support pull this or does it need to come from our CSM? Want to make sure we right-size the renewal.

title: GET /api/v2/customers returns wrong tenant data
body: Serious issue. We're using the API with tenant=globex-inc in the query params and are sometimes getting back records that clearly belong to a different tenant (names don't match any of our customers). Request id: req_4a8d7e2f1b. This is a data-isolation concern and we need it looked at urgently.

title: How do I whitelist IPs for the API?
body: Starting to pilot automation against the API. Our SecOps team wants us to whitelist our egress IPs before we move past POC. Is there a self-serve way to add IP allowlist entries, or does it need to go through support? We have 4 IPs to add.

title: Invoice line item labeled 'PROF-SVCS-DISCOVERY' - what is this?
body: On our April invoice there's a line item for $3,500 labeled PROF-SVCS-DISCOVERY. We didn't purchase any professional services to my knowledge. Attaching the invoice. Can someone confirm what this is for? If it's legitimate I need the SOW number for our finance records.

title: Need service account credentials rotated
body: Per our internal 90-day rotation policy we need to rotate the service account API credentials for our Initech integration. Current key is about to expire. What's the process and can you coordinate timing so we don't break production?

title: TPS report export is missing the cover sheet template field
body: Bill Lumbergh here. Our weekly TPS report exports have been missing the 'Cover Sheet Template' field since about 4/16. We need that field for the new procedure. Yeah. Has something changed in the export schema? We didn't get a release note about it.

title: Can I cancel my account?
body: not getting value from the product. how do i cancel? do i get a prorated refund for the remaining month? been a customer for 10 months on starter.

title: Report scheduler says 'queued' for 4 hours
body: Scheduled my weekly ops report for 9am this morning. It's now 1pm and the status is still 'queued'. Previous runs went through in under 2 minutes. Nothing in my audit log suggests a problem. Is the scheduler backlogged?

title: Enterprise SSO config review
body: Hi - as part of our annual SOC2 audit, our auditors are asking for a walkthrough of our SAML SSO configuration on your platform (IdP is Azure AD). Could someone from your security team join a 30-minute call next week to walk through claim mappings, certificate rotation schedule, and just-in-time provisioning settings? Flexible on timing.
